verdict: AI displacement risk is moderate, with 35% of tasks automatable by current frontier models.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 4, 8, and 10 from the O*NET task list are routine cognitive tasks that can be automatable by current frontier models.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment and Regulatory Moat
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, and 9 require creative judgment or regulatory moats that are less likely to be automated.

adjacent_careers.name: Bookkeeper
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both accountants and bookkeepers prepare financial records, but accountants have a broader scope of responsibilities.

adjacent_careers.name: Auditor
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Accountants and auditors both examine and evaluate financial records, but auditors focus on ensuring compliance with laws and regulations.

recent_developments.headline: New AI-powered accounting software launched
recent_developments.impact: This new software can automate tasks such as data entry and reconciliations, but may not replace the need for human judgment in complex financial matters.

recent_developments.headline: Banks roll out AI copilots to analysts and traders
recent_developments.impact: JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley, and Goldman now offer LLM tools to thousands of frontline staff.

quotes.quote: AI is going to change every job. Every single job. Some jobs it will eliminate, some jobs it will improve, and some jobs it will create.
quotes.speaker: Jamie Dimon
quotes.title: CEO, JPMorgan Chase

quotes.quote: Two-thirds of jobs in the United States and Europe are exposed to some degree of AI automation, and roughly a quarter of current work could be done by generative AI.
quotes.speaker: Joseph Briggs and Devesh Kodnani
quotes.title: Economists, Goldman Sachs Research
quotes.source: Goldman Sachs report: The Potentially Large Effects of AI on Economic Growth

quotes.quote: Generative AI could add the equivalent of 2.6 to 4.4 trillion dollars in value annually across the global economy. Banking, high-tech, and life sciences capture the largest share.
quotes.speaker: McKinsey Global Institute
quotes.title: Research report
quotes.source: The Economic Potential of Generative AI
